---
title: "Tax Reliance and Democracy"
subtitle: "Cross-country scatter explorer, 1990–2020"
date: 2025-08-01
categories: [Political Economy, Historical Economics, lang:English]
description: "An interactive scatter plot exploring the relationship between non-resource tax reliance and V-Dem democracy indices across 108 countries, 1990–2020."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Placeholder — replace with your Shiny or Observable embed.
